description_long: This lighthouse features a tall, rectangular brick tower with a robust base and a distinct lantern room at the top, encased in glass panels and capped with a dark, conical roof. The structure is primarily composed of dark reddish-brown masonry, giving it a solid and historic appearance. The lantern room is detailed with a grid of window panes, suggesting the presence of a powerful light beacon within. The base is wider and more ornate, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. There is no visible gallery balcony or external walkway around the lantern room. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A tall, rectangular brick lighthouse with a glass lantern room and conical roof, set on a sturdy, ornate base. The structure is dark reddish-brown and lacks a gallery balcony.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular tower, ornate base, and the glass lantern room with a conical roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the flat sides of the tower and the symmetry of the structure, with the lantern room and roof still prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the tower, with minimal detailing and the lantern room at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the uniformity and solid construction of the lighthouse.
